metadata.name: US Large-Cap GICS Stock Research Universe

excluded_secondary_share_classes.GOOG: secondary Alphabet share class; GOOGL retained
excluded_secondary_share_classes.FOX: secondary Fox share class; FOXA retained
excluded_secondary_share_classes.NWS: secondary News Corp share class; NWSA retained

metadata.license_note: Source dataset states Public Domain Dedication and License (PDDL). Verify upstream terms before redistribution.
metadata.important_warning: This is a present-day membership snapshot. Backtests must use point-in-time membership and historical GICS classifications to avoid survivorship and classification look-ahead bias.

universe_rules.purpose: broad liquid US large-cap research starting set
universe_rules.refresh_frequency: daily membership check; monthly classification audit
universe_rules.live_eligibility: apply dynamic liquidity, history, price, corporate-action, trading-status and risk filters before each research or portfolio run
universe_rules.issuer_deduplication: one representative listed share class per company
universe_rules.final_broker_validation: resolve and qualify the exact IBKR contract before trading

risk_timeframe_profile.notes: Static tags are broad research priors, not suitability labels. Liquidity, volatility, drawdown, profitability, borrowability and data quality decide actual eligibility on each rebalance date.
